package rulecoverage

func NegativeApiExamplesEmbeddedInHandlersInsteadOfTransportDocsHelpers() string {
    ruleID := "api_examples_embedded_in_handlers_instead_of_transport_docs_helpers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Long example payload blocks hardcoded in handlers rather than doc or example helpers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
